26787.title: Mary Berry Cooks
26787.description: Mary shows how to cook dishes to impress guests at a dinner party without getting hot and bothered in the kitchen, including two delicious canapés, a salmon and asparagus starter, a main course of guinea fowl and a decadent chocolate tart.

26796.title: Mary Berry Cooks

26983.title: Mary Berry Cooks
26983.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

31776.title: Mary Berry Cooks
31776.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.
